_label_note: AUTO-LABELED by LLM. Spot-check before refreshing recall.lock.json. Lock updates must include this provenance in --reason per item 16.
_label_tier_note: Stage B strict tier reconciled to deterministic engine output and pending project-owner approval; ideal_must_detect preserves broader auto-label/legal-coverage spans for roadmap gap discovery.

warnings: drop must_detect: unsupported financial amount shape rule='financial_amount' text='INR 3,240,000,000'
drop ideal_must_detect: unsupported financial amount shape rule='financial_amount' text='INR 3,240,000,000'

_strict_reconciliation.method: must_detect rebuilt from PreSendReviewEngine strict findings; previous strict and ideal labels retained in ideal_must_detect for gap discovery

ideal_must_detect.matched_text: Term Sheet — Proposed acquisition of 51% equity share capital of Pavantra Labs Limited (an Indian listed public company) by Reniva Energy Limited; this document is indicative and non-binding except for Confidentiality, Exclusivity, Costs, and Governing Law (India).

Consideration and valuation: INR 3,240,000,000 payable in two tranches (80% at Closing, 20% after 12 months subject to working capital true-up); any reference to share price is UPSI under SEBI (PIT) Regulations until disclosed to stock exchanges.
Governance post-closing: Reniva to nominate one director and one observer; proposed nominee is Mr. Raghav Iyer, FCA, who shall chair the Audit Committee and oversee treasury integration.
Payment mechanics: Closing tranche to be remitted to escrow at Samrat Bank Ltd., Branch: Central Navi Prana, A/c No.: 0482 77XX 9021, IFSC: SAMR0000521; escrow terms in Annex II.

Miscellaneous: this term sheet does not constitute an offer document, prospectus, or profit forecast; brand names “NimbusGrid” and “SunLeaf” mentioned in synergy plans are product codenames and not securities identifiers.
no employee MAC addresses are collected for monitoring
device telemetry is limited to browser type and session duration
R Y I P I 1 2 3 4 Z

Linkable identifiers for onboarding the nominee (internal record only): Mr. Raghav K. Iyer (DOB: 1991-04-09, age 33), role: CFO-designate at Pavantra Labs Limited, office: Plot 18, Sector 19, Navi Prana, Maharashtra 410110, device alias: “PAV-CFO-ThinkPad-T14”, email: raghav.iyer@pavantra.example.ltd, PAN: R Y I P I 1 2 3 4 Z, A a d h a a r: 1234 5678 9000 (masked), employee code: PL-EMP-0097, session_ref: sess-rghv-0421-nvp-5f29
consents will be captured for specified purposes and revocable
Proposed acquisition of 51% equity share capital of Pavantra Labs Limited (an Indian listed public company) by Reniva Energy Limited

uncertain.reason: Isolated demographic reference declared non-linkable; may not identify an individual under DPDPA.
Standalone location in a generic example; not linkable to an identifiable person.
